calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Bifurcate
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Seth Rosenberg of Liberty Law telephone number 510-645-1000 for Plaintiff Paul Lee.
Joel Glaser of Joel Glaser APC telephone number 310-922-9390 appeared by telephone for Defendant Airport Van Rental, Inc.
David Garthe of Boornazian, Jensen & Garthe telephone number 510-834-4350 appeared by telephone for the remaining Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AIRPORT VAN RENTAL, INC.'S Motion To Bifurcate Claims From the Underlying Liabilty and Damages at trial is denied without prejudice to being made to the trial Judge. The trial Judge is in a better position to decide this motion than a Judge handling pretrial motions. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
